senses.definition: (of a part of the body) not covered by any clothing

examples.x: She felt the cool breeze on her bare arms as she walked along the beach.
His bare chest glistened with sweat after a vigorous workout at the gym.
She blushed when she realized her bare feet were visible under the table at the fancy restaurant.
The hiker's bare legs were scratched and muddy after trekking through the wilderness.
He wore a sleeveless shirt that left his bare shoulders exposed to the sun.

senses.definition: one of a series of small balls of wood, glass, etc. with a hole in the middle that a string can go through to make a rosary or necklace, etc.

examples.x: She carefully threaded each colorful bead onto the string to create a beautiful necklace.
As she prayed, she slowly moved her fingers over each bead of the rosary, reciting the prayers with devotion.
A single bead rolled off the table and onto the floor, quickly disappearing under the couch.
The intricate design of the bracelet was enhanced by the addition of a single, shining bead at the center.

senses.definition: a piece of metal or plastic with a hinged pin that is used for fastening a belt, bag, shoe, etc.

examples.x: He adjusted the buckle on his belt, ensuring it was securely fastened before heading out.
The old leather satchel had a brass buckle that added a touch of vintage charm.
After lacing up her boots, she fastened the top strap with a sturdy metal buckle.
The child's seatbelt buckle clicked into place with a satisfying snap, ensuring safety on the road.
She admired the intricate design on the buckle of her new handbag, which was shaped like a delicate flower.

senses.definition: a piece of cloth or plastic fastened at the neck of a child to protect its clothes when eating or drinking

examples.x: The baby giggled as her mother tied a colorful bib around her neck before feeding her.
After each meal, the stained bib was tossed into the laundry to be washed.
He chose a bib with a playful dinosaur pattern for his toddler’s lunchtime.
The waterproof bib kept the baby’s clothes clean, even when she spilled juice.
She packed an extra bib in the diaper bag, just in case of any messy emergencies.

senses.definition: a piece of decorative cloth tied in a bowknot

examples.x: She added a bright red bow to her ponytail, giving her hairstyle a playful touch.
The gift box was wrapped in shiny paper and adorned with a large, elegant bow.
He straightened the bow on his tuxedo, ensuring it was perfectly centered before the event.
The little girl's dress was embellished with a pink bow at the waist, making her look even more adorable.
She tied a delicate bow around the bouquet of flowers, completing the lovely arrangement.

senses.definition: a hard shiny piece of mass that is shaped like a ball inside the shell of an oyster and is a highly valuable gem

examples.x: She wore a stunning necklace made of perfectly round, lustrous pearls that glimmered in the light.
The oyster yielded a beautiful, rare black pearl that fetched a high price at the auction.
The dress was embroidered with tiny pearls, adding a touch of sophistication to the design.
They found an old chest filled with treasures, including a strand of pearls and other precious jewels.

senses.definition: (of clothes) short and revealing

examples.x: She felt uncomfortable in the brief dress, as it revealed more skin than she was used to showing.
The beachgoers lounged in their brief swimsuits, soaking up the sun on the hot sand.
He opted for brief shorts during the hot summer days to stay cool and comfortable.
The model strutted down the runway in a series of brief outfits that showcased her toned physique.
Despite the chilly weather, some daring individuals still wore brief attire to the outdoor concert, wanting to make a fashion statement.

senses.definition: having a pattern of small squares with usually two different colors

examples.x: She wore a checked blouse that featured a classic black and white pattern.
He glanced at the checked shirt hanging in his closet, debating whether to wear it for the casual outing.
The checked flag waved vigorously as the winner crossed the finish line, signaling the end of the race.

senses.definition: having a pattern of small squares with different colors

examples.x: She wore a checkered scarf with alternating black and white squares.
The checkered flag signaled the end of the race.
She wore a checkered shirt that reminded everyone of classic picnic blankets.

senses.definition: (of clothes and fabrics) having a design that is very detailed and complicated

examples.x: The elaborate gown featured intricate lace detailing and delicate embroidery, making it a stunning choice for the red carpet event.
She admired the elaborate craftsmanship of the Renaissance-style bodice, with its ornate patterns and beading.
The elaborate costume worn by the lead actor in the period drama captured the essence of the character's aristocratic background.
The fashion designer showcased her talent with an elaborate evening gown, complete with cascading layers of chiffon and bejeweled accents.
His elaborate attire, consisting of a tailored velvet jacket and silk ascot, exuded old-world charm and sophistication.

senses.definition: (of clothes) made in a way that closely covers the body

examples.x: The fitted dress hugged her curves perfectly, accentuating her figure.
She slipped into the fitted jeans, feeling confident and stylish for her night out.
The fitted jacket completed the ensemble, adding a touch of elegance to her outfit.

senses.definition: (of women's clothing) revealing the neck and the upper part of the chest

examples.x: She wore a low-cut blouse that accentuated her collarbones and added a touch of allure to her outfit.
The evening gown featured a low-cut neckline that drew attention to her décolletage, making her feel elegant and sophisticated.
Despite the chilly weather, she opted for a low-cut sweater to showcase the delicate necklace she received as a gift.
The actress stunned on the red carpet in a glamorous gown with a low-cut back and plunging neckline.
The fashion designer's collection included several low-cut tops and dresses, catering to those who wished to make a bold fashion statement.

senses.definition: (of a shirt) worn without a tie and not fastened at the neck

examples.x: The casual dress code allowed employees to wear open-necked shirts in the office.
She preferred the comfort of open-necked blouses during the warm summer months.
Attending the beach wedding, he chose an open-necked linen shirt to stay cool in the tropical weather.
The fashion-forward designer showcased a collection of open-necked dresses that exuded effortless elegance.

senses.definition: (of clothes) very tight
(of clothes) without any sleeves

examples.x: She opted for a sleeveless blouse to stay cool in the summer heat, pairing it with a flowing skirt for a casual yet chic look.
The sleeveless dress highlighted her toned arms, adding a touch of elegance to her ensemble.
He wore a sleeveless shirt to showcase the intricate tattoo on his upper arm, a conversation starter at the beach party.
Despite the chill in the air, she layered a sleeveless sweater over her blouse for a stylish and layered look.
The bride chose a sleeveless gown for her outdoor wedding, allowing her to move freely and comfortably as she danced the night away.

senses.definition: (of clothes) well-cut and fitted

examples.x: He looked sharp in his tailored suit, the jacket and trousers fitting him perfectly.
The tailored dress hugged her curves in all the right places, making her feel confident and elegant.
The tailored coat was crafted from high-quality fabric, ensuring both style and warmth during the winter months.
He invested in a tailored shirt for important business meetings, believing that a well-fitted outfit made a strong impression.

senses.definition: an item of clothing that is worn on the body, including various types of clothing such as shirts, pants, dresses, etc.

examples.x: The designer created a stunning garment that was the highlight of the fashion show.
She carefully folded each garment before placing it in her suitcase, ensuring they remained wrinkle-free.
The traditional garment worn during the ceremony was rich in cultural significance and history.
He admired the intricate embroidery on the vintage garment, a testament to the craftsmanship of a bygone era.
She selected a lightweight garment for her trip to the tropics, prioritizing comfort in the warm climate.

senses.definition: men's underwear that loosely covers the thighs

examples.x: He prefers wearing boxers over briefs for the added comfort and breathability.
The store had a wide selection of boxers, featuring everything from classic plaid to quirky patterns.
After his shower, he slipped into a fresh pair of boxers and a comfortable T-shirt.
She bought her husband a set of silk boxers as a special anniversary gift.
The laundry basket was overflowing with socks and boxers, signaling it was time for a wash.

senses.definition: a loose-fitting piece of clothing worn by women or girls before bed

examples.x: She chose a silky nightie to wear on her honeymoon, feeling both elegant and comfortable.
The little girl hugged her teddy bear tightly as she snuggled into bed in her favorite pink nightie.
For her birthday, she received a luxurious nightie made of soft, high-quality fabric.
The old-fashioned nightie had delicate lace trim and tiny buttons down the front, evoking a sense of nostalgia.
She felt a sense of relief changing into her cozy cotton nightie after a long day at work.

senses.definition: a loose garment without sleeves that is fastened at the neck and hangs from the shoulders, shorter than a cloak

examples.x: The superhero's iconic red cape billowed dramatically in the wind as he stood on the rooftop.
She wore a stylish black cape over her evening gown, adding a touch of elegance to her ensemble.
The children's costume included a colorful cape that fastened easily around the neck with a Velcro strip.
On her trip to the historic castle, she bought a handwoven cape as a souvenir, appreciating its craftsmanship.
The magician's performance was enhanced by his mysterious cape, which he used to conceal his tricks.

senses.definition: a loose overgarment without sleeves fastened at the neck

examples.x: The wizard's cloak was adorned with mystical symbols and stars, making him look even more enigmatic.
She wrapped herself in a warm, woolen cloak to ward off the chill of the evening air.
The assassin moved silently through the night, his dark cloak blending seamlessly with the shadows.
At the medieval fair, many participants wore elaborate cloaks that added to the authenticity of the event.
He clasped his cloak at the shoulder with an ornate brooch, ready to embark on his journey through the forest.

senses.definition: a long piece of fabric worn over the head or shoulders

examples.x: She draped a colorful shawl over her shoulders to add a pop of color to her outfit.
The elderly woman wrapped a knitted shawl around herself to keep warm during the cool evening.
At the wedding, the bride's mother wore an elegant silk shawl that matched her dress perfectly.
He bought a beautifully embroidered shawl from the market as a souvenir of his trip to India.
The dancer's flowing shawl moved gracefully with her, enhancing the beauty of her performance.

senses.definition: the part of a sleeve at the wrist that can be turned back

examples.x: He rolled up the cuffs of his shirt before starting the manual labor, ensuring they wouldn't get in the way.
The elegant dress shirt featured French cuffs, which he adorned with a pair of gold cufflinks.
She admired the intricate embroidery on the cuffs of her new blouse, which added a unique touch to the design.
The tailor measured the length of his trousers carefully, making sure the cuffs would fall just right over his shoes.
He adjusted the cuffs of his jacket, ensuring the sleeves fit comfortably around his wrists.

senses.definition: any device that is used to close or secure something, such as a zipper or strap

examples.x: She struggled with the fastener on her necklace, eventually asking for help to secure it properly.
The jacket had a sturdy zipper fastener, keeping the cold wind out effectively.
He admired the antique brooch with a delicate pin fastener that once belonged to his grandmother.
The dress featured a hidden fastener on the side, creating a seamless and elegant look.
She replaced the broken fastener on her purse with a new, more secure clasp.

senses.definition: a narrow piece of cloth, leather, etc. used for fastening, carrying, or holding onto something

examples.x: She adjusted the strap of her handbag, making sure it rested comfortably on her shoulder.
The backpack's padded straps made it easy to carry, even when loaded with books.
He tightened the strap on his watch, ensuring it fit snugly around his wrist.
The sandals had adjustable straps, allowing her to customize the fit for maximum comfort.
She secured the strap of the camera around her neck before heading out to take photos.

senses.definition: the way a garment is cut, giving it a particular style

examples.x: The designer's signature style is evident in the clean lines and precise cut of each garment.
The tailored cut of the suit accentuated his physique, giving him a polished and professional appearance.
She prefers dresses with a loose, flowing cut that allows for freedom of movement and comfort.
The asymmetrical cut of the blouse adds a modern twist to the classic design, making it stand out.
The couture gown featured intricate draping and a dramatic cut, showcasing the designer's skill and artistry.

senses.definition: the exciting and attractive quality of a person, place, etc. that makes them desirable

examples.x: The actress exuded glamour as she walked the red carpet in a sparkling, designer gown.
The old Hollywood movie captured the timeless glamour of the 1950s with its elegant costumes and set designs.
She transformed her living room into a scene of glamour with crystal chandeliers and luxurious fabrics.
The fashion magazine's photoshoot aimed to showcase the glamour of high-end couture.
Despite the early morning and hard work, the model maintained an air of effortless glamour during the photoshoot.

senses.definition: things worn on the feet, such as shoes, boots, etc.

examples.x: The store had a wide selection of footwear, ranging from athletic sneakers to elegant heels.
He slipped off his footwear before entering the sacred temple, as a sign of respect.
The hiker wore sturdy footwear with thick treads to navigate the rugged terrain.
She admired the intricate embroidery on the traditional footwear worn by the dancers during the cultural festival.
The fashion designer's latest collection included innovative footwear designs that merged style with comfort.

senses.definition: to take off someone else's clothes

examples.x: In the locker room, teammates playfully stripped each other after the game.
The police stripped the suspect of his clothing as part of the search procedure.
As part of the initiation ritual, new members were stripped by the senior members.
In the movie, the villain threatened to strip the captured hero to humiliate him.
In the emergency room, medical staff quickly stripped the accident victim of his torn clothing.

senses.definition: a long and thin string or cord that is passed through the hooks on a shoe and pulled tightly to fasten it

examples.x: He tied his shoelace in a double knot to ensure it wouldn't come undone during his run.
The child struggled to learn how to tie her shoelaces, practicing diligently until she got it right.
She replaced the frayed shoelaces on her sneakers with bright, new ones, instantly refreshing the look of her shoes.
The marathon runner checked the tightness of his shoelaces one last time before the race began.
The shoelace on her boot snapped, forcing her to stop and tie it before continuing on her hike.

senses.definition: a cloth with a smooth and thick surface, typically made of cotton or silk

examples.x: The curtains were made of rich velvet, adding a touch of luxury to the room.
The tailor carefully measured the velvet before cutting it for the gown.
She draped the velvet over the armchair, instantly transforming its appearance.
In the dimly lit room, the velvet curtains added an air of mystery.

senses.definition: the measurement around the middle part of someone's body

examples.x: The waistline of the pants was adjustable, allowing for a customized fit.
After weeks of exercise, she noticed a significant reduction in her waistline.
The dress accentuated her narrow waistline, drawing attention to her hourglass figure.
He struggled to button his jeans, as his waistline had expanded since last year.

senses.definition: a piece of natural or synthetic hair that is worn on the head

examples.x: She donned a wig to complete her costume for the costume party.
After losing her hair due to chemotherapy, she felt more confident wearing a wig.
The actor's wig was meticulously styled to resemble the character he was portraying.
She decided to try a different hairstyle by wearing a colorful, synthetic wig.
The wig flew off her head in the strong wind, revealing her natural hair underneath.

senses.definition: not suitable or acceptable for a certain situation or context

examples.x: Making jokes about a serious topic like illness is inappropriate and can hurt others' feelings.
Wearing pajamas to a formal event would be inappropriate attire.
Using foul language in a professional setting is inappropriate behavior.
Sharing personal details about someone without their consent is inappropriate.
Making loud noises in a quiet library is considered inappropriate behavior.

senses.definition: clothes, used particularly when being sold

examples.x: The boutique offered a wide selection of high-quality apparel for men and women.
He sorted through the racks of apparel, searching for the perfect outfit for the job interview.
The company specialized in athletic apparel, catering to fitness enthusiasts.
She donated her gently used apparel to the local charity organization.
The fashion show featured the latest trends in designer apparel from around the world.

senses.definition: shoes that have tall and thin heels, worn by women

examples.x: The heels of her shoes clicked against the pavement as she hurried down the street.
She loved the feeling of empowerment that came with wearing a pair of stylish heels.
The actress towered over her costars in a pair of sky-high heels on the red carpet.
After a long day of wearing heels, her feet were sore and in need of a break.

senses.definition: a tight-fitting piece of clothing made of rubber that is worn by underwater swimmers to remain warm

examples.x: He zipped up his wetsuit before heading into the chilly ocean waters to surf.
The wetsuit provided insulation and protection against the cold currents.
She adjusted the fit of her wetsuit to ensure it hugged her body snugly.
The diver donned a wetsuit before plunging into the depths of the reef.
After a day of snorkeling, she peeled off her wetsuit, feeling exhilarated from her underwater adventures.
